authors.author: Colin Buchanan
Colin Buchanan
Das Nachtlied (Gott ist da in dunklen Nächten)

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In the darkness God will keep me He will stay and never sleep In the darkness God is brighter Though the night is long and deep

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: All this day Your hand has held me God of Heaven, by my side Thank you, Father, for Your goodness You will hold me through the night

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the shadows You are with me And you know my every fear In the shadows none can harm me For the mighty King is here

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: So I find my rest in Jesus He who came to rescue me Jesus saved me from the darkness I will rise to life with him
